work_name: The Gateless Barrier of the Chan School
author: 無門慧開 (Wumen Huikai, 1183–1260)
edition_kind_note: Single-witness transcription extracted from Chinese Wikisource. NOT a critical edition. The author Wumen Huikai's text is in the public domain (PD-old, died 1260), but the Wikisource transcription text used as source carries CC BY-SA 4.0 attribution and share-alike obligations.
license_basis: PD-old work + CC BY-SA 4.0 site-text obligation from the Wikisource transcription used as the conversion source.

witnesses_consulted.label: Chinese Wikisource page "無門關"
witnesses_consulted.rights: PD-old underlying work + CC BY-SA 4.0 site-text license on the Wikisource transcription itself
witnesses_consulted.rights_basis_text: The captured oldid HTML shows page-level PD-old / public-domain language for the underlying work, and the Wikisource site footer declares site text available under CC BY-SA 4.0.

production_method: Wikitext-to-TEI deterministic conversion via tools/wikitext-to-tei/convert-gateless-barrier.mjs in this repository. Synthetic line identifiers (wm.*) are minted by the converter; the file references no CBETA woodblock notation.
production_notes: Single-witness transcription. Will be supplemented (not replaced) by a critical edition reconciled from multiple woodblock scans, published separately under text_id ce.gateless-barrier with CC0 licensing.
